notes: orcid_profile_json column contains the full /person response (incl. external-identifiers, emails, researcher-urls, other-names)
orcid_affiliations_json column is always [] — /person endpoint does not return employments/educations (need separate /employments endpoint, NOT queried)
orcid_external_ids_json column is always [] — extractExternalIds() in lib/orcid_enrich.js looks for {value: ...} format but ORCID returns plain strings for external-id-type / external-id-value
orcid_credit_name column is always NULL — extractCreditName() has the same {value:...} mismatch on given-names / family-name
See SUMMARY.md section "Critical finding: extract functions mismatch ORCID v3 /person response shape" for details
